hero.title: DWARF 3
hero.subtitle: Small in size, big on surprises.

cards.moreShootingModes: More shooting modes for you to choose from

deepSpace.title: See Deep Space
deepSpace.subtitle: Make the distant, captured clearly visible

lightweightBody.title: Lightweight body
lightweightBody.subtitle: Dictionary size, lightweight at 1.35kg
lightweightBody.description1: DWARF 3 is your <light>perfect travel companion,</light> ready to embark with you at any time.
lightweightBody.description2: <light>With a body weight of approximately 1.35 kg,</light> it can be easily taken along for travel, camping, or weekend outings.

easyStart.title: Easy to Get Started
easyStart.subtitle: Smart control, one-tap shooting via the App.

nfc.title: Efficient Pairing, Connect with One Touch
nfc.description1: DWARF 3 <light>supports NFC quick connection, just a light touch to pair efficiently,</light> and enter the shooting process.
nfc.description2: Reduce connection time, leave your attention for the visuals.

starChart.title: Star Chart Locates Stars, One-Click to Start Shooting
starChart.description1: Select the target in the star chart, and DWARF 3 automatically locates and tracks it.
starChart.description2: <light>From 'what to shoot' to 'shooting now', just one step.</light>

hardware.title:
Outstanding Imaging
Originates from Core Strength

dualLens.title: 6-element apochromatic dual-camera lens group
dualLens.subtitle: Wide-angle × telephoto dual-lens collaboration, perfect for both starry skies and landscapes.

sensor.title: Sony IMX678 Starvis 2 sensor
sensor.subtitle: High sensitivity + low noise, making faint nebulae more layered.

specs.readNoiseDesc: Darker areas are cleaner, details are more stable
specs.fullWellDesc: Highlights are more relaxed and less prone to clipping

filters.title: Built-in three filters
filters.subtitle: Switchable VIS / Astro / Dual-Band modes adapt to various lighting conditions. Different filters reveal different night skies.

specs.standardDesc: Covers the 430-650nm visible light range, suitable for daytime and regular shooting.
specs.astroDesc: Extends to the 440-690nm infrared range, suitable for deep space and low-light environments.
specs.dualBandDesc: Featuring a dual-band OIII (500.7nm) + Hα (656.3nm) filter design, it significantly reduces the impact of urban light pollution, enhances the contrast and detail of emission nebulae, and delivers a cleaner, more pristine image.

formats.title: Multiple formats, designed for the future
formats.subtitle: From sharing directly to professional retouching, one device does it all.
formats.description: Offers multiple photo format outputs including JPG, PNG, FITS, and TIFF, providing more space and possibilities for post-processing and final image selection.

creativeCenter.title: Creation Center
creativeCenter.subtitle: Built-in astronomical post-processing and stacking capabilities make astrophotography simpler and more efficient.

astroPost.label: Astrophotography Post-processing
astroPost.title:
One-Click Optimization
Deeper Space, Clearer Views

description.oneClick: No post-processing experience? No problem. You can still make your photos look great and reliable.
description.denoise: Noise reduction preserves details, clean without blur
description.starCorrection: Correct star point shapes to restore the natural starry sky.
description.starRemoval: Separate star points, highlight nebula structures, and reserve space for advanced processing.
description.watermark: One-click annotation of key information makes sharing more professional and gives your work a stronger sense of ownership.

megaStack.label: Multi-night Stacking
megaStack.title:
Cross-Time Stacking
Easy Synthesis
megaStack.subtitle: Supports seamless stacking of multiple shooting results, enhancing clarity, reducing noise, and making the final image cleaner and higher resolution.
megaStack.after:
500 frames stacked,
processed with Stellar Studio

wideView.title: 3° Field of View
wideView.description: A single field of view can easily cover the entirety of most deep-sky objects, presenting complete and detailed image features.

mosaic.title: Mosaic, area surged
mosaic.description: The astronomical mosaic also further enhances the field of view, expanding the shooting area of a single frame to four times its original size through a 2×2 stitching mode. Rotate and zoom to compose freely, capturing the full panorama of the nebula more completely.

advancedFeatures.title: Advanced Features
advancedFeatures.subtitle: Exclusive premium features, a must-have for high-end players

exposure.title:
Exposure up 
to 60 s
exposure.description: Supports exposure times of up to 60 seconds, significantly enhancing detail restoration and image quality in low-light environments, making the layers of deep-sky objects richer and details clearer.

equatorial.title: Equatorial Mount Mode
equatorial.description: Break through the limitations of traditional theodolite equipment to achieve more precise celestial tracking. Simultaneously eliminate image field rotation to preserve the integrity of stars to the greatest extent.

curves.title: Equipped with curve color grading
curves.description: Built-in curve color grading function, supports fine adjustment of RGB channels, redistributes color balance, and accurately restores the true color representation of celestial bodies.

scheduled.title: Schedule a Shoot
scheduled.description:
Set the target shooting plan in advance, and DWARF 3 will automatically start shooting at the scheduled time.
No need to stay up all night, and no fear of missing the window period.

battery.title: Battery Life
battery.description: Equipped with a high-performance battery, it remains unfazed by extreme cold or heat, ensuring stable and continuous operation throughout the entire night.
battery.note: Under room temperature conditions, the actual measured average battery life for astronomical photography can reach up to 5.5 hours, suitable for operating environment temperatures from -20°C to 45°C.

moreSubjects.title: More Shooting Subjects
moreSubjects.subtitle: Beyond the starry sky, there are also worlds

0.title: Milky Way
0.description:
DWARF points to the sky to locate the Milky Way, one-click shooting,
automatic foreground separation and stacking, easy photo output.

1.title: Star Trail
1.description:
Star Trail Mode, automatic foreground separation and stacking.
One shot, get star trail photos and videos.

2.title: Sun
2.description:
One-click sun lock, stable tracking,
sunspots clearly visible.

3.title: moon
3.description:
Steadily track the moon,
record every phase change.

appFeatures.mainDescription: Multi-language support, background continuous shooting, IP54 protection—making outdoor shooting smoother and more seamless.

multiLanguage.title: Multilingual App
multiLanguage.description: Covering global users, now supports 10 languages including Chinese, English, Japanese, Spanish, German, and more.

background.title: Offline Automatic Operation
background.description: Even if the app is in the background, minimized, or disconnected, the DWARF 3 continues to run, allowing you to return and check progress at any time.

ip54.title: IP54 protection
ip54.description: Dust and dew resistant for worry-free outdoor use, providing extra protection for observation and photography.

moreFun.title: Bird Watching & Panoramic Photography
moreFun.subtitle: From birding tracking to ultra-clear panoramas, one device makes observation and recording simpler

birding.title: Auto-lock target for continuous tracking
birding.description:
After identifying the target, the DWARF 3 automatically locks on and continuously tracks it.
Even if it suddenly takes off, the dual-camera system can quickly reacquire and steadily follow.

panorama.title: 100 Billion Pixel Panorama
panorama.description:
Algorithmic smart stitching creates natural, seamless images.
Ultra-wide field of view + massive detail, zoom in as much as you want and it stays sharp.
